---
title: New review on ruthenium catalysts for the OER
date: 2025-01-27
categories: [Publication]
---

Congratulations to Shailendra Sharma on his <a href="https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S0360319924057045" target="_blank">paper</a> in the International Journal of Hydrogen Energy investigating ruthenium-based electrocatalysts for the oxygen evolution reaction. The review examines catalyst activity, stability, and structure–performance relationships relevant to proton exchange membrane water electrolysis. A large collaborative effort to review a huge amount of literature. Well done Shailendra!
